title: Hotel mario: Words replaced with Mother 3/Earthbound 64 unreleased beta
description:
WARNING: MOST STUPID VIDEO I'VE MADE YET! 

I was bored watching the earthbound 64/mother 3 unreleased beta and this came into my mind, and I havent made one of these anyway... 

This was supposed to be made 1 month ago but my internet had stoipped working and I left this behind. Dont worry I'll make a way better video next time.
